title: aws-sm: transient SDK errors mapped to Backend instead of Unavailable
description: map_get_error() and map_put_error() catch all non-ResourceNotFound SdkError variants (including TimeoutError, DispatchFailure, ResponseError) and map them to SecretError::Backend. These are transient — callers that treat Backend as permanent will fail fast instead of retrying. Trigger: any network hiccup, timeout, or throttle while calling AWS SM. Bad behavior: caller gives up when a retry would succeed.
